items.title: Follow up on US Bank <> Echelon AI intro to confirm meeting is scheduled
items.context: Email from Meghan Kober (US Bank SVP) on May 14: 'Please send over some dates and times that would work for you. Looking forward to connecting!' — responding to Fan's intro of Echelon co-founders Eddie and Rahul.

items.title: Review IndyKite Series A progress — 1 draft term sheet, 11 VCs in process
items.context: Email from Lasse Andresen (IndyKite CEO) on May 13: 'Eleven VC firms are currently reviewing our dataroom content, and we have 1 draft term sheet on the table.' Significant update from prior status of waiting for a lead.

items.title: Follow up with Barak (Opti) on US Bank meeting outcome
items.context: Email from Barak Perelman on May 10: 'BTW I'm meeting David @ US Bank on Tue Morning' — relevant to LP intro strategy and deal positioning.

items.title: Prep for in-person meeting with Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) on May 26
items.context: Email thread confirms in-person meeting at Fin Capital offices on May 26 at 10:30am PT with Zoom hybrid. Simone confirmed: 'Let's do 10:30, and we'll plan on in person.'

items.title: Follow up with Simone (Prism Layer) on review materials requested Apr 28
items.context: Email from Jake on Apr 28: 'When you get a chance, can you please share the materials for our review?' — bumped again on May 8 with no materials received in the thread.

items.title: Prep for Gist Security intro meeting on May 18
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Fin Capital <> Gist' on May 18 at 1pm ET with Jake, Derek, and tal@gist.security.

items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Fin Capital <> Rig Security' on May 18 at 1:30pm ET with Jake, Derek, and guy@rig.security.
